site.name: SF AMERICAN R NR LOTUS CA

service_notes.value: Provisional data are subject to revision. Go to http://waterdata.usgs.gov/nwis/help/?provisional for more information.
service_notes.title: disclaimer

interpretation: This is negative availability evidence, not a modern flow record.
The attached historical daily discharge record for USGS 11445500 ends on 1995-09-30, and this 2026-07-06 instantaneous-values request returned no P30D series.
South Fork low/median/high visual and gameplay bands still need modern official flow or release evidence plus guide review before promotion.
next_source_leads: USGS site inventory and nearby active stations for South Fork American River context
California Data Exchange Center, SMUD, PG&E, or project/operator release records if public and terms permit
Guide/outfitter observed flow notes tied to date, reach, and weather/release context
promotion_gate: Do not treat USGS 11445500 as a live modern gauge until a service request returns current discharge/stage values or an official alternate source is attached.
